mapper.sql: id , user_id, name, sex, birthday, phone, bed_id, begin_time, end_time, content, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_live (id, user_id, name, sex, birthday, phone, bed_id, begin_time, end_time, content, status, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bedId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{beginTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_live
id,
user_id,
name,
sex,
birthday,
phone,
bed_id,
begin_time,
end_time,
content,
status,
remark,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bedId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{beginTime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{endTime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_live
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bed_id = #{bedId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=DATE},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_live set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bed_id = #{bedId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select a.*, b.bed_no,b.room_id, c.room_name from t_live a inner join t_bed b on a.bed_id = b.id inner join t_room c on b.room_id = c.id where b.room_id = #{roomId} order by b.bed_no asc;
select count(id) from t_live where status = 0;
select count(id) from t_live where status = 0 and sex = #{sex};
select count(id) from t_live where status = 0 and begin_time = #{beginTime}
